signature.claim_scope: mask-free radiomics sensitivity baseline; not conventional masked PyRadiomics
signature.frame_time_vector_policy: accept T, T-1, and leading-zero T+1 interval vectors
signature.glcm_direction_aggregation: symmetric pooled counts across four directions
signature.normalization: within-run 1st/99th percentile clipping on the downsampled sequence
signature.physical_spacing_note: pixel spacing is absent for most source DICOMs; texture distances are normalized image units
signature.roi_policy: fixed central whole-field crop; no lesion or territory mask is available
signature.spatial_policy: quadrant pairs summarized by mean and absolute left-right difference to enforce reflection invariance
signature.temporal_resampling: linear interpolation to 32 normalized-time samples using FrameTimeVector/FrameTime with frame-index fallback

method_definitions.ap_temporal_svm: Matched AP temporal-DINO, standardized balanced LinearSVC.
method_definitions.biview_all_logreg: Early AP+lateral temporal-DINO plus spatial radiomics, balanced logistic C=1.
method_definitions.biview_all_svm: Early AP+lateral temporal-DINO plus both spatial-radiomics vectors, LinearSVC.
method_definitions.biview_temporal_logreg: Early AP+lateral temporal-DINO concatenation, balanced logistic C=1.
method_definitions.hierarchy_blended_gate_ap_segment: Nested blend of paired-DINO and paired-radiomics PCA gates; AP-DINO M2/M3 expert.
method_definitions.hierarchy_blended_gate_biview_segment: Nested blended PCA gate; AP+lateral DINO M2/M3 expert.
method_definitions.hierarchy_dino_gate_ap_segment: Nested PCA-vs-MCA paired-DINO gate; AP-DINO M2/M3 expert.
method_definitions.late_dino_radiomics_logreg: Nested one-weight blend of paired-DINO and paired-radiomics three-class logistic probabilities.
method_definitions.lateral_temporal_svm: Matched lateral temporal-DINO, standardized balanced LinearSVC.

protocol.inner_tuning: patient-grouped cross-fitted predictions within each outer training fold only
protocol.outer_validation: patient-grouped; every run/view from a patient remains in one fold
protocol.selection_metric: inner cross-fitted macro-F1; ties use M3 F1, then less radiomics
protocol.selection_note: Comparing methods on repeated outer CV is exploratory; final promotion still requires a locked patient-level test.

public_export.note: The full raw result remains local because the GitHub repository is public.
